title: wasm client delivers own broadcast messages to JS callback
description: wasm/src/client.rs set_event_callback lines 133-143: the 'deliver' notification handler forwards all deliver events to JS, including ones where params.from == own pub_id. Every other client (CLI bridges, ffi) checks deliver.from == own_pub_id and skips the echo. The relay does echo broadcasts back to the sender (confirmed by bridge-jmap line 267, bridge-slack line 128, bridge-teams line 108). Fix: store pub_id in the notify callback closure and gate on from != pub_id.
